expectations.text: States the meeting type / altitude it sized the room for (design / working / maker level)
Surfaces Ahmed Benali (Integration Architect) and Bram Hendriks (Domain Architect, Payments) as hands-on design participants
Aisha Khan (Tribe Lead, Payments) is included at a working-relevant score, NOT dropped for being too junior
expectations.evidence: 7/10, the delivery/maker voice; inverse of the strategy case.

expectations.text: Does not elevate a person to the top purely on seniority; a 'Head of' is only high if their discipline is core to this design
expectations.evidence: Carlos and Anika (Head of) both pushed to ~3 as too senior/peripheral.

expectations.text: Flags that the actual hands-on builders (unprofiled reports such as Maria Oliveira / Jonas Bakker) are missing from the wiki
expectations.evidence: 'Represented by their stream' note names Maria/Jonas/Hannah, represented by Aisha.

expectations.text: Every ranked stakeholder has a 1-10 score and a rationale, ordered highest first
No fabricated people in the ranked list (unprofiled wiki-link people only in the gap note)
